title: Update module github.com/crc-org/vfkit to v0.6.3
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/crc-org/vfkit](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit) | `v0.6.1` → `v0.6.3` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcrc-org%2fvfkit/v0.6.3?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcrc-org%2fvfkit/v0.6.1/v0.6.3?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>crc-org/vfkit (github.com/crc-org/vfkit)</summary>

### [`v0.6.3`](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/releases/tag/v0.6.3): vfkit v0.6.3

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/compare/v0.6.2...v0.6.3)

This release fixes problems when using the `github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pkg/config` from the `v0.6.2` release to generate the command line to start a `vfkit` binary older than `v0.6.2`

#### What's Changed

- Restore backwards compatibility for VirtioNet:ToCmdline() by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [#​419](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/419)
- build(deps): bump github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/v2 from 2.7.2 to 2.8.0 in /tools by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​417](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/417)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.39.0 to 0.40.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​418](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/418)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/compare/v0.6.2...v0.6.3>

### [`v0.6.2`](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/releases/tag/v0.6.2): vfkit v0.6.2

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/compare/v0.6.1...v0.6.2)

This vfkit release has a number of new features:

- nested virtualization support for linux guests
- support for VMs which use host disk devices
- added `--device virtio-serial,pty` to get an interactive TTY
- improved `--device virtio-net,unixSocketPath=…` behaviour, including better command line compatibility with `krunkit`
- added support for `network-config` files when using cloud-init
- improved cleanup when vfkit is stopped using signals

#### What's Changed

- cmd: add support for nested virtualization by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​327](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/327)
- Add krunkit compatibility for virtio-net devices by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​372](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/372)
- serial: Add --device virtio-serial,pty support with ConsoleDeviceConfiguration by [@​evidolob](https://redirect.github.com/evidolob) in [#​259](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/259)
- feat: Support raw block devices by [@​mcfx](https://redirect.github.com/mcfx) in [#​373](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/373)
- Auto-add GPU devices when `--gui` flag is specified by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​380](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/380)
- Add support for network-config file in cloud-init by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​304](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/304)
- feat: add graceful VM shutdown on exit signals by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​316](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/316)
- Improve virtio-net shutdown by [@​nirs](https://redirect.github.com/nirs) in [#​386](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/386)
- feat: error out on qcow2 block devices by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​300](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/300)
- pkg/rest: refactor and simplify by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​292](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/292)
- Add a Process struct for managing processes by pid file by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​293](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/293)
- ignition: Don’t use a unix socket for the HTTP server by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [#​375](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/375)
- test: fix 10s unreachable timeout in helpers by [@​walteh](https://redirect.github.com/walteh) in [#​313](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/313)
- ci: add macOS-15 runner and enable tests on all macOS versions by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​348](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/348)
- ci: migrate from macos-13 to macos-15-intel runners by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​376](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/376)

#### Documentation updates

- docs: Add guide for building uncompressed kernel by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​325](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/325)
- Doc: Add document for supported macos versions by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​390](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/390)
- README: Add brew hyperlink by [@​osalbahr](https://redirect.github.com/osalbahr) in [#​354](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/354)
- Add a script to start vfkit with cloud init configuration by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​286](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/286)
- Add script to boot VM with ignition and user provided ssh key by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​287](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/287)
- docs: add guide for accessing boot logs in vfkit by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​323](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/323)
- Doc improvements by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [#​311](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/311)
- Add gvproxy/helper-vmnet scripts by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [#​317](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/317)
- Assorted fixes by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [#​319](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/319)
- OWNERS: Add Gunjan by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [#​366](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/366)

#### Dependencies updates

- test: Update from f40 to f42 by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [#​344](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/344)
- bump version of tcpproxy to github [issue#39](https://redirect.github.com/issue/vfkit/issues/39) by [@​djalanxyz](https://redirect.github.com/djalanxyz) in [#​312](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/312)

comments.body:
### ℹ️ Artifact update notice

##### File name: go.mod

In order to perform the update(s) described in the table above, Renovate ran the `go get` command, which resulted in the following additional change(s):


- 4 additional dependencies were updated


Details:


| **Package**                     | **Change**               |
| :------------------------------ | :----------------------- |
| `github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v4` | `v4.25.11` -> `v4.25.12` |
| `golang.org/x/sys`              | `v0.39.0` -> `v0.40.0`   |
| `github.com/containers/common`  | `v0.62.2` -> `v0.64.2`   |
| `golang.org/x/mod`              | `v0.30.0` -> `v0.31.0`   |

I’ll tag a 0.6.3 release soon, but CI should be fixed if you pick up `github.com/crc-org/vfkit@main`
This PR must not be merged as is, good that CI caught it.
I asked the bot to rebase that should pick up 0.6.3 and then we see if CI will be happy.

https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27872/checks?check_run_id=59935323885 is green.
It’s a relief that’s the 0.6.2 regression was caught by CI !
